description: Siphon flow rate verification against Torricelli's theorem

tolerance_notes.velocity: JS implementation should match Torricelli velocity within 1%
tolerance_notes.flow_rate: Flow rate should match within 2% (allows for timestep effects)
tolerance_notes.drain_time: Drain time should match within 5% (accumulation of per-step errors)
tolerance_notes.note: Real siphons have friction losses (Darcy-Weisbach), so ideal values are upper bounds
